name: CIS Controls v8.1
disclaimer: This maps CIS Controls v8.1 safeguards to NIST 800-53 controls for compliance tracking. CIS Controls content is licensed under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 by the Center for Internet Security. All descriptions here are independently written. This is NOT a CIS-certified product.

requirements.name: Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets
requirements.description: Actively manage all enterprise assets connected to the network

requirements.name: Inventory and Control of Software Assets
requirements.description: Actively manage all software on the network to ensure only authorized software is installed

requirements.name: Data Protection
requirements.description: Develop processes and technical controls to identify, classify, handle, retain, and dispose of data

requirements.name: Secure Configuration of Enterprise Assets and Software
requirements.description: Establish and maintain secure configurations for enterprise assets and software

requirements.name: Account Management
requirements.description: Use processes and tools to assign and manage authorization to credentials for user accounts

requirements.name: Access Control Management
requirements.description: Use processes and tools to create, assign, manage, and revoke access credentials and privileges

requirements.name: Continuous Vulnerability Management
requirements.description: Continuously acquire, assess, and take action on vulnerability information

requirements.name: Audit Log Management
requirements.description: Collect, alert, review, and retain audit logs for security events

requirements.name: Email and Web Browser Protections
requirements.description: Improve protections and detections of threats from email and web vectors

requirements.name: Malware Defenses
requirements.description: Prevent or control the installation, spread, and execution of malicious applications

requirements.name: Data Recovery
requirements.description: Establish and maintain data recovery practices to restore enterprise assets to a trusted state

requirements.name: Network Infrastructure Management
requirements.description: Establish and maintain the secure network infrastructure to prevent unauthorized access

requirements.name: Network Monitoring and Defense
requirements.description: Operate processes and tooling to establish and maintain comprehensive network monitoring

requirements.name: Security Awareness and Skills Training
requirements.description: Establish and maintain a security awareness program for the workforce

requirements.name: Service Provider Management
requirements.description: Develop a process to evaluate service providers and manage their risk

requirements.name: Application Software Security
requirements.description: Manage the security lifecycle of internally developed, hosted, or acquired software

requirements.name: Incident Response Management
requirements.description: Establish a program to develop and maintain an incident response capability

requirements.name: Penetration Testing
requirements.description: Test the effectiveness and resiliency of enterprise assets through penetration testing

checklist.text: Establish and maintain a detailed enterprise asset inventory
Address unauthorized assets (remove, deny, quarantine, or update inventory)
Establish and maintain a data management process including data sensitivity classification
Enforce data retention based on data sensitivity classification
Encrypt data on end-user devices with full-disk encryption
Encrypt data on removable media
Encrypt sensitive data in transit
Encrypt sensitive data at rest
Establish and maintain a secure configuration process
Establish and maintain an inventory of accounts
Use unique passwords for all enterprise assets
Disable dormant accounts after 45 days of inactivity
Restrict administrator privileges to dedicated admin accounts
Establish an access granting process based on need-to-know/least privilege
Establish an access revoking process upon termination or role change
Require MFA for externally-exposed enterprise applications
Require MFA for administrative access
Establish and maintain a vulnerability management process
Perform automated operating system patch management
Establish and maintain an audit log management process
Collect audit logs from enterprise assets
Ensure adequate storage for audit logs
Deploy and maintain anti-malware software
Configure automatic anti-malware signature updates
Establish and maintain a data recovery process
Perform automated backups
Establish and maintain an isolated instance of recovery data (air-gapped or offline)
Ensure network infrastructure is up to date
Centralize security event alerting across enterprise assets
Establish and maintain a security awareness program
Train workforce members to recognize social engineering attacks
Establish and maintain an inventory of service providers
Designate personnel to manage incident handling
Establish and maintain contact information for reporting security incidents
Establish and maintain an enterprise process for reporting incidents
Establish and maintain a penetration testing program
